member.name: M:GTA.Math.Quaternion.Slerp(GTA.Math.Quaternion,GTA.Math.Quaternion,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates between two quaternions, using spherical linear interpolation..
member.param:
Value between 0 and 1 indicating the weight of
.
member.returns: The spherical linear interpolation of the two quaternions.
